---
title: "Research"
output: distill::distill_article
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Conference Papers

Gupta, A., Wu, V., **Webley-Brown, H**., King, J., Ho, D. (2023). [*The Privacy-Bias Tradeoff: Data Minimization and Racial Disparity Assessments in U.S. Government*](https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3593013.3594015){style="color:#005354"}. In Proceedings of the 2023 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '23).

[`r fontawesome::fa("star-of-life", height = "12px")`]{style="color:#005354"} *Best Paper Award* – FAccT 2023

[`r fontawesome::fa("star-of-life", height = "12px")`]{style="color:#005354"} *Student Paper Award* – Privacy Papers for Policymakers [*(PPPM)*](https://fpf.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/FPF-PPPM-2024-Digest-FINAL-PRINT-R3-singles-1.pdf){style="color:#005354"} ; Future of Privacy Forum

[`r fontawesome::fa("star-of-life", height = "12px")`]{style="color:#005354"} [*Policy Brief*](https://hai.stanford.edu/policy-brief-privacy-bias-trade){style="color:#005354"} -- Institute on Human-Centered
Artificial Intelligence *(HAI)*

## Works in Progess

Democracy Under Surveillance: The Effect of Pretrial Electronic Monitoring on Voting Behavior

Prison Gerrymandering: How Much Do Prison Population Counts Matter for Redistricting Outcomes? *(with Ariel White and Zachary Markovich)*
